channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 20.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: New Health Secretary named after Streeting resignation sparks potential Labour leadership contest
item.description: New Health Secretary named after Streeting resignation sparks potential Labour leadership contest

item.title: BBC Politics: Watch: The day Labour's potential leadership race began to heat up
item.description: Watch: The day Labour's potential leadership race began to heat up

item.title: ITVX: Peston: Starmer has handed his future to Burnham - ITVX
item.description: Peston: Starmer has handed his future to Burnham - ITVX

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham has path to challenge PM but must win byelection first
item.description: Andy Burnham has path to challenge PM but must win byelection first

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister
item.description: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
item.description: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer will not attempt to block Burnham from standing to be MP in Makerfield - as it happened
item.description: Starmer will not attempt to block Burnham from standing to be MP in Makerfield - as it happened

item.title: The Guardian: What was HMRC’s investigation into Angela Rayner’s tax affairs all about? - The Guardian

item.title: Novara Media: Breaking: Labour Together MP Quits Seat for Andy Burnham

item.title: The Guardian: ‘Is he getting rid of Starmer?’ Profile boost for Streeting in Ilford North seat - The Guardian
